text: Added DMat.gemmInto (C := alpha*A*B + beta*C) and linearCombinationInto (C := alpha*A + beta*B) over open single-owner DMatBuilder destinations. beta=0 replacement ignores poisoned C; fused zero coefficients suppress source reads. Shape, closed, and alias failures are deterministic; row/transposed/strided inputs pass. High-level operators remain allocating and now share the same GEMM/SYRK dispatch helper. Verification: 154 dense/backend tests pass JVM+JS; Vector 27/27, native storage 3/3, FFM BLAS/LAPACK 21/21. n=128 JMH: GEMM reuse 5.984 B/op vs 131134.596; fused reuse 0.259 B/op vs 262288.443. JS reports zero owned results and one destination reuse/op.
